title: Deselect Star-rating in Monday form
excerpt: We would very much like the capability to deselect ratings in a non-compulsory star-rating column within a Monday Form. Thus, if you’ve assigned a rating of 1, 2, or 3 stars but then decide you prefer not to rate at all …

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml: We would very much like the capability to deselect ratings in a non-compulsory star-rating column within a Monday Form. Thus, if you’ve assigned a rating of 1, 2, or 3 stars but then decide you prefer not to rate at all and skip the question, you should have the option to deselect the initial rating.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Steven,

I hear you and agree this would be a valuable addition

I have converted this into a feature request for you so that our community can vote to get this change implemented!

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Thank you so much! I hope to see it be implemented in the future

Have a great day!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Steven,

Some exciting news! After sharing this with the product team, they are aiming to roll this out in the new iteration of the rating question in forms - stay tuned :)))

Thank you for sharing this feedback

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Amazing. Thanks for the update

Have a great day!
